title: Polyscias otopyrena
intro: Polyscias otopyrena, also known as the Tonga sasanqua, is a species of plant in the family Araliaceae. This plant has been found to possess several health benefits, including anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant properties, which have been attributed to its ability to aid in wound healing and reduce inflammation. The bioactive constituents of Polyscias otopyrena include flavonoids, triterpenoids, and phenolic compounds, which are responsible for its medicinal properties. Traditionally, Polyscias otopyrena has been used to make various herbal preparations, including teas and tinctures, which are used to treat a range of health issues, including fever, coughs, and skin infections.
